name: Martyrdom of Hazrat Usman (RA)
description: Observing the martyrdom of the third Caliph of Islam, Hazrat Usman ibn Affan (RA).

name: Islamic New Year
description: Beginning of the new Hijri year (1448 AH). A time for reflection and renewal of faith.

name: Day of Ashura
description: Fasting on the day of Ashura expiates the sins of the past year.

name: Eid Milad-un-Nabi
description: Observance of the birth of the Prophet Muhammad (PBUH).
